name: upkeep
description: macOS system cleanup and updater. v1.1 reworks /upkeep:update on macOS with parallel discovery scouts, a compatibility synthesizer that flags cross-manager risks (brew:node ⇒ npm globals, brew:openssl ⇒ ruby native gems, system Ruby ⇒ --user-install), single approval gate, parallel apply across independent ecosystems, PATH-shadow detection, and history-tuned ETA. Linux/WSL2 paths unchanged. Cleanup unchanged. Five entry points: deep, quick, audit, update, upkeep.
